raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "chinceku Draudseß/ un preekſch
viſſeem Moabiteereem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kahds jelle tu effi Akiorß?
in kahdi irr Eewrãina Algad-
cht? ka tu pee muns tahds Pra-
veets effi/ itt kataß Schodeen irr/
in fakki/ ka ta Israëta Tauta
ne irr uswarrejama/ tapehz ka
vinna Deeivß tohs paſargahß:
Bet kas jelle par Deewu irr/ ka
veen Nebukadnezarß?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schis fuhta farwu Warru/
un iſpohſtihs tohs no tahs Sem-
nes Wirjuß/ un winnu Deeivß
tohß ne iſpeſtihs: Bet mehs
vinna Kalpt apkauſim tohs ka
veenu weeniqu Wibru/ un tee
ne paneſtihs muhfu Sirgu
Warru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo mehs gribbam tohs ar
winneem famihdiht/ ka winnu
Kalni no winnu Affinin peedſir-
dinati taps/ un winnu Lauki ar
winnu Mixroneem pilditi kxuhs/
un ne weena Behda muhfu
Preeſcha pretti ſtahwehs/ bet
tee ees wiſſai bohjá/ ſakka tas
Kehniſch Nebukadnezarß tas
Kungs wiſſas Pafaules: Jo
wiſſch to irr faazzijs/ un tee
Wahrdi winna Wallodas welti
ne buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tu Akiorß/ to Ammo-
niteru Algadſis/ kas tu tahdue
Wahrdus effi runnajs tai Dee-
nã tawas Netaifnibas/ tu ne
redſefi wairs manun Waign no
ſchihs Deenas/ kamehr es buh-
tchu atreebees pee tahs Tautas/
kas no Egiptes nahluſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tad ees ta Dſelse man-
na Karxa-Spehka un tee Lau-
dis/kas man kalpo/ zaur taweem
Sahneem/ un tu krittiji ſtarp
wiſſu Eewainoteem/ kad es af-
greesſchohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadehß buhß manneem
Kalpeem tew us tahm Kalnu-
Weetahin ſtabdinahß/ un liks
tew eekſch weena no teem Pilß-
fahteem/ prett ko mehs zelfimeeg.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tew ne buhß eet bohjá/
kamehr tu lihds ar winneem aib-
eeti pohtá.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja tew Jerriha irr ta-
wa Sirdi/ ka tee ne tapß pahr-
wahreti/ tad ne behdajees wiſtai:
Es eſmu to runnajs/ un ne weens
no manneem Wahrdeem paliks
nedarrichts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad pawebleja Olower-
nus farweem Kalpeem/ kas win-
na Telti ſtahweja/ ka tee Akioru
remtu un winnu us Betuliju
ſtabdinatu/ un teem Israëta
Behrneem Rohka dohtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna Kalpt ſehme
to/ un iſwedde to no Lehgera ah-
ra us Lauku/ un gahje no Klaſ-
juma us Kalnu-Weetahin/ un
nahze lihds tahm Akkahm/ kas
leijas puffé pee Betultjas bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu tee Pilſfahtheekt
tohß pee Kalna Wirß galla re-
dseja/ ſehme tee farwas Brua-
nas/ un iſgahje ahran Pilſfah-
ta us ta Kalna Wirsgallu/ un
wiſſi Lingotaji uſſehine winnu
uskahpjamas Weetas/ un meh-
taja Almirus prett winneem.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
